title: Spellblades' Frosty Deathchill
description: Turns the Deatchill armor set into something inspired from Death Knights.
body:
This is a resourcepack addon for Spellblades And Such by roost_er

Turns the Deatchill armor set into something inspired from Death Knights.

How to install?

Download the zip and put it in your resourcepacks folder, then enable it ingame.
